_comment_fig5: Pipeline A inpainting examples — median-quality one per class. Picked from your success lists.
_comment_fig6: Pipeline A vs B. Row 1 is the freeform stage-coupling failure: a real freeform annotation around a boy. PA mask = dashed contour → FLUX removes the contour, boy preserved. PB mask = SAM-2 filled object → FLUX removes the boy. Row 2 is the n/l false-positive case: a letter on a t-shirt is detected as a glyph annotation. PA correctly takes no action (no real annotation there), PB inpaints the small region with a visually-plausible reconstruction, illustrating the regional invariance of n/l class to false positives.
_comment_fig7: Pipeline A segmentation SUCCESS cases. One per class, picked from your hand-curated success lists.
_comment_fig8: Pipeline A segmentation FAILURE cases. Set to null = auto-select at IoU 10th percentile. Replace with manual IDs once you find instructive failures via search_samples.py.
